message: I hear you. I’ve done that too. But they said that kind of strategy usually doesn’t work well in postsecondary—especially with back-to-back deadlines and harder content.
Hmm. I mean, I don’t want to crash and burn, but I’ve always managed before.
Yeah, but they showed us how stress builds up when you leave everything to the last minute. You end up getting more anxious and sleep-deprived, which can mess with your grades—and your mental health.
